purpose: Record operator-provided discovery links that should feed Gather, Index, Forum, Crucible, and Telos without promoting blocked pages, social threads, or provider marketing into evidence.

leads.promotion_rule: Use only as a product-discovery lead until a browser/session/API capture or independent source resolves concrete tools and claims.
Treat as a GPU-provider execution-substrate research lead; do not cite for rendering algorithm claims.
Treat as infrastructure and compatibility lead; resolve pricing, GPU models, and terms through current provider docs before use.
Treat as render-farm discovery lead; keep provider availability separate from Telos rendering-technique evidence.

next_actions: gather.browser: revisit blocked or JavaScript-heavy social/provider pages when a browser capture is available.
index.context: keep provider execution surfaces separate from algorithmic rendering research sources.
crucible.assess: require repeatable benchmarks before any provider or GPU claim becomes MATCH.
